reviews.author: Maribel Marroquin
reviews.text: Tommy was great! Experience was amazing

reviews.author: Omar Z
reviews.text: Tons of fun for adult and kids. Not a place to watch your kids play you’re in it too!

reviews.author: Maria G.
reviews.text: Took my kids here for a birthday party and they didn't want to leave. The LED floor games are genuinely fun for adults too — Floor Is Lava got competitive fast.

reviews.author: Sergio Daniel
reviews.text: Pixel Rooms was amazing. Naomi was so fun and helpful!!

reviews.author: Jesus Anguiano
reviews.text: Naomi was amazing 10/10

reviews.author: Devon R.
reviews.text: The laser maze is the best I've tried in LA. Staff were friendly and reset the games quickly. Great location inside Glendale Galleria.

reviews.author: Anna K.
reviews.text: Really fun hour with friends. Button Matrix was our favorite. Only note: weekends get busy, book ahead.

reviews.author: James T.
reviews.text: Perfect for a team outing. We did Pixel Duel tournaments for two hours. Clean, modern, well run.

reviews.author: Sofia M.
reviews.text: My 7-year-old calls this the best place in the mall. The pixel floor reacts to every step — kids are mesmerized.

reviews.author: Cornelio Hernandez
reviews.text:
If you're looking for a unique and unforgettable experience, Pixel Rooms is an absolute must-visit! From the moment you walk in, you're immersed in a world of creativity, challenge, and pure fun. The rooms are brilliantly designed with vibrant visuals and interactive puzzles that keep you fully engaged the entire time.
What really stood out was how well everything was put together—each challenge felt fresh and exciting, and the technology worked seamlessly. Whether you're going with friends, family, or even on a date, it's the perfect way to bond, laugh, and test your problem-solving skills.
The staff were also incredibly friendly and helpful, making the whole experience even better. You can tell they genuinely care about making sure everyone has a great time.
Overall, Pixel Rooms delivers an amazing, high-energy experience that’s both entertaining and memorable. I’ll definitely be coming back to try more rooms!

reviews.author: Tanja Sotto
reviews.text: pixel room was SO fun!! the three rooms were insanely fun. floor is lava was our FAVORITE. also naomi was such a huge sweetheart, great energy all around!! the trinkets were also cute, rooms were cold, and there was water!! thank you so much for making my anniversary with my boyfriend the best!

reviews.author: Rachyl Schulte
reviews.text: Tommy was awesome

reviews.author: Ally Seibert
reviews.text:
Did this with a group of friends and had a GREAT time. Josdon was great at explaining everything and was very kind. Would highly recommend and would definitely go back.

Big plus -- there's also parking, which was a relief since it's always so hard to park around there.

reviews.author: Leo P.
reviews.text: Swoosh Hoops is addictive. Came for 30 minutes, stayed for two hours. Will be back with the office crew.

reviews.author: Justin DeCamp
reviews.text: Absolute blast. Super fun and great atmosphere and Josdon was super nice and accommodating

reviews.author: kolby Maniglia
reviews.text: Tommy and the arcade in general was super super fun extremely entertaining and a great workout!! As well as the rooms are just cool to look at !

reviews.author: Paul Roller
reviews.text: Tommy was great!

reviews.author: Liv Ivanov
reviews.text: Had an awesome experience! The floor is lava room was very fun. Tommy was a great host!

reviews.author: Noe Cameron
reviews.text: Tommy was great! Amazing guide and very informative and jovial! Love this space

reviews.author: Alex Tomko
reviews.text: Sooo freakin fun! Tommy is full of energy and helps elevate the experience. Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Tigran Tovmasyan
reviews.text: Had a birthday party for my 7 years old son with his friends group of 20 , everything was amazing ! Thank You!

reviews.author: Ashley C
reviews.text: Great for all ages. A way to workout your brain and body. A great way to work on patience and cooperation.

reviews.author: Victor DeMayo
reviews.text: Great experience!! Naomi was awesome!

reviews.author: Isabel Valencia
reviews.text: naomi was great!! made me feel like a kid teehee

reviews.author: Kimberly Liu
reviews.text: Super fun experience! Really got us all moving! Tommy was extremely friendly and explained everything really clearly too!

reviews.author: Kev Bellemort
reviews.text: It was a very fun time, all the games are super engaging. Tommy, our host, was very friendly and explained the games well. I definitely will come back

reviews.author: Jack Himes
reviews.text: Amazing place to go. Ricky was a really sweet person. My girlfriend and I had a blast. If it’s two people you will be working up a sweat. Will be going back! 10/10 experience !!!

reviews.author: Larenz Roberts
reviews.text: Pixel rooms was a fun experience! We went as 2 people and still had a great time, but I’ll definitely come back with a group. Tommy was a great host, both informative and friendly, and helped us to understand the games and ensure we had a pleasant experience. The experience was a lot of fun, but be warned… you will be sweaty by the time you leave!

reviews.author: Ashley Reyes
reviews.text: Great way to workout and have fun at the same time with friends! Tommy has been great with our group! Highly recommended

reviews.author: Franz Fona
reviews.text: Tommmy is an amazing host!!

reviews.author: Janus Angelo Batoon
reviews.text: Coming here was a blast! And Tommy was very helpful and entertaining at the same time

reviews.author: Laura Wilkinson
reviews.text: Had a great time for our 13yr old’s birthday!

reviews.author: hoter patricio
reviews.text: BEYOND FUN BEYOND GOOD — THE spot to go!!! Thanks Naomi!!!!

reviews.author: Christopher Chen
reviews.text: Ricky and Naomi are amazing and such great hosts. Pixel rooms was such a fun date night event that I came back with my daughter to experience it with them once again! Highly recommend and lazer room is definitely the best

reviews.author: Monica A
reviews.text: Had a great time! Tommy was really nice! Would definitely come back!

reviews.author: Suresh Nanjappan
reviews.text: The place was a greasy fun with the family . Tommy was awesome, guiding us in everyway.

reviews.author: Shawna Allen
reviews.text: This was such a fun experience for all ages. We have kids ages, 4, 6 and 14 and everyone had a great time. Our host Tommy was great and made our time here very special. We I’ll definitely be coming back and looking into hosting birthday parties here.

reviews.author: Ethan Torres
reviews.text: Tommy was a very good guide and host

reviews.author: Fredrick Kerley

reviews.author: J A
reviews.text: Tommy was a great host and helped us have fun!  Would come again

reviews.author: Jessica Mike
reviews.text: It’s really fun with friends, I would not recommend wearing jeans or long sleeve shirt if you are gonna come here

reviews.author: sooz y
reviews.text: Came by today for the first time. Naomi helped us out, she was very friendly, informative and made the experience even more fun! Will return with friends again

reviews.author: Michael Seung
reviews.text: Fun experience! Naomi was a great host explaining the games!

reviews.author: Jasmine Alvarez
reviews.text: The rooms were so much fun! There are a lot of games to play and they give you a lot of time to complete the levels. Tommy was a great game master, he explained the games perfectly and he was very nice!

reviews.author: Alta Lainez
reviews.text: This was amazing! We came for a birthday party as a family, Kids and adults. Every single one of us had fun! Bonding, yelling, jumping, all the things! Tommy was a great host! Would def recommend! The bigger the group the better!

reviews.author: Victor Ujadughele (Ujah)
reviews.text: Fun place to spend time with the family.

reviews.author: grace tagtow
reviews.text: SO fun. I’ve wanted to do something like this ever since Brainsurge on Nickelodeon in the early 2000s. Also Tommy was awesome!! Will definitely take more people here. Thanks Pixel Rooms!!

reviews.author: Daniel Alvarado
reviews.text: Very fun!!! Me and my whole family had so much fun!!

reviews.author: Justin Hinh
reviews.text:
I went here on 12/31/2025 and had an incredible time! I went with one other person and all the mini games had modes for single players, two players, and up.

I got to feel like a kid again and ignore the wider worlds if only for just an hour. I highly recommend taking anyone here from kids to adults!

reviews.author: Tony Silva
reviews.text: Tommy was an awesome game curator, definitely coming back with my family and a bigger group pixel room was our favorite

reviews.author: Александр Боровков
reviews.text: Insanely fun and brave

reviews.author: Colin Yun
reviews.text: Tommy made our experience extremely fun. All 3 of the rooms kept us engaged and were super fun. 10/10 experience would go again.
